plugins.name: ratchet
plugins.description: Floor-first agentic coding workflow for Claude Code — machine-enforced gates (intent-before-code, verify-before-done) over an ephemeral task file. Context derived from code, not authored.

plugins.name: vault-driven-development
plugins.description: Skills, agents, and hooks for Vault-Driven Development — a per-project descriptive Source-of-Truth pattern for Claude Code workflows.

plugins.name: flow-driven-development
plugins.description: Flow-driven development for Claude Code — plan around the FLOW of what you change instead of guessing a single 'root'. Skill-centric: plan → build → review → done.

plugins.name: cidd
plugins.description: Collective-intelligence-driven development for Claude Code — each stage (explore/plan/build/review) takes a different orchestration shape based on oracle availability: explore=divergent generation+judge, plan=lens friction, build=generate-verify-repair, review=hard-oracle gate with advisory lenses.
